steps.t: The road to Tornhad is in the western Angle. You should look for the elderly couple along the road to Tornhad.
Waltney and Garan Maythorn are located near Eitheldir. Elladan has asked you to see how fares the elderly couple headed to Tornhad.
Waltney and Garan Maythorn are located near Ost Waeren. You should let Waltney and Garan know that the ravagers have been defeated.
